# GitHub Pages Deployment Guide

## Your site is ready!

After enabling Pages, your site will be available at:
**https://sueryue.github.io/Gothic-1-Remake/**

## How to enable GitHub Pages:

1. Go to https://github.com/sueryue/Gothic-1-Remake/settings/pages
2. Under 'Source', select 'Deploy Branch'
3. Select branch: **master**
4. Select folder: **/ (root)**
5. Click Save

That's it! Your site will be live within 1-2 minutes.
